problem: Recent MC runs repeatedly report `data_status=OK_FALLBACK` with an unchanged `spot=671.39` for hours, but no explicit spot age/freeze guard is enforced in the run artifact. This can let stale underlying snapshots look healthy enough for ranking/monitoring logic, degrading trade-readiness reliability and potentially mis-prioritizing setups.

evidence.observed_pattern: Repeated entries with `data_status=OK_FALLBACK`, `data_source=cboe-delayed-public`, and identical `spot=671.39` across dozens of runs.
evidence.risk: If spot recency is not explicit and fail-closed, downstream logic may consume stale state as actionable context during source degradation or market-closed transitions.

required_change: Add explicit spot recency metadata to MC/heartbeat JSON outputs: `spot_snapshot.asof`, `spot_snapshot.age_seconds`, `spot_snapshot.max_age_seconds`, `spot_snapshot.fresh`.
Introduce configurable freshness SLA for spot snapshots (default strict during market-hours; relaxed/explicit policy outside market-hours) with deterministic policy output field.

Add freeze detection guard: if spot value remains unchanged beyond configurable horizon while market-hours policy requires movement-capable feed, emit `DATA_QUALITY_FAIL: stale_spot_snapshot` and fail closed (`action_state=NO_TRADE` / equivalent gate false).
Ensure fallback sources can only return `OK_FALLBACK` when spot freshness passes; otherwise emit normalized failure reason code (no ambiguous OK).
acceptance_tests: Unit test: fresh spot snapshot within SLA => `spot_snapshot.fresh=true`, no stale/freeze reason, existing decision path unchanged.
Unit test: spot snapshot age exceeds SLA during market-hours => normalized `DATA_QUALITY_FAIL: stale_spot_snapshot`, fail-closed decision, stale counter increments.
Unit test: unchanged spot beyond freeze horizon during market-hours with repeated polls => `DATA_QUALITY_FAIL: stale_spot_snapshot` (or dedicated freeze reason), freeze counter increments.
Unit test: outside market-hours policy marks relaxed mode explicitly (`spot_snapshot.policy=relaxed_out_of_hours`) and does not produce false-positive stale alerts while still surfacing age metadata.
Integration test: replay fallback feed fixture with frozen spot; verify no run is labeled healthy (`OK`/`OK_FALLBACK`) unless freshness policy passes and metadata fields are present.
constraints: Do not relax existing fail-closed protections for data-quality failures.
Keep schema backward compatible with additive fields and normalized reason codes.
Policy logic must be timezone/session aware and deterministic in tests.
